_comment: Member-360 preset for the Detail Drawer (a generic DataTable capability). Paste into a table widget's 'Detail Drawer Config (JSON)' field (Odoo widget form, Advanced tab) or load it via the designer. Column/table names are examples — adjust to your registered Schema Builder source. All source:"sql" sections run against the parent table widget's own schema_source_id (any connector). Every sql section must reference %(row_key)s.

sections.title: Member Information
sections.sql: SELECT hum_id, st, program FROM members WHERE src_mbr_id = %(row_key)s

sections.title: Plan Information
sections.sql: SELECT mco_contract_nbr, overall_rating FROM members WHERE src_mbr_id = %(row_key)s

sections.title: Member Flags
sections.sql: SELECT partd_low_income_ind, srf_ind FROM members WHERE src_mbr_id = %(row_key)s

sections.title: Measures and Gaps 2026
sections.sql: SELECT measure_cat, measure_desc, compliant, monthly_compliance, non_compliance_reason, suggested_call_to_action FROM care_gaps WHERE src_mbr_id = %(row_key)s
